issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Send welcome transactional email on signup
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits the exact /api/v1/transactional endpoint with transactionalId and dataVariables keys; baseline guesses generic template/data fields and may use the wrong endpoint.

scenarios.name: Trigger plan-upgrade automation via event
scenarios.rationale: Treatment posts to /api/v1/events/send with eventName and eventProperties matching the documented schema; baseline invents a /track or /events endpoint with non-matching field names.
